hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq "(^|[[:space:]])rm[[:space:]]+(-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*f|-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*r)"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"rm -rf detected. Confirm the path before letting this run.\"}}"; fi'
